purpose: Cross-computer collaboration rules that both Q xiaohu and Erliang can read from the same repo.

relayToErliangPlainText.note: Forwardable text for Erliang should stay plain text and avoid code blocks.

startup.ifMissing: Report the missing path; do not invent a replacement file.

coordination.crossComputerRule: Local workspace files are not shared truth unless they are committed here or otherwise synchronized into a common store.

onConflict: report status before choosing a side
gitSafety.divergedLocalCommitRule: Create a backup branch or ref before any destructive recovery step.

roles.qxiaohu: Primary builder/operator for implementation and architecture.
roles.erliang: Support role for review, input gathering, summaries, and low-risk coordination until startup recall and git safety stabilize.
